description: CompositionBlue round neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves and a softly ribbed white neckline, mesh panels on the sides and shoulders, adidas' three stripes printed on both sleeves, brand name and logo printed on the left chest, grey piping on the shoulders and from the back of the armholes extending to the front hem and is engineered with ClimaCool technologyFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water below 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsThis sporty white T-shirt from adidas is the answer to upping your casual style. The contrast stripes and piping look great against the white front, making you stand out in a crowd with ease! And forget about sweat as the soft comfortable cotton and the mesh panels keep you fresh all through the day. Pair it with jeans, shorts or tracks for a great look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18&rdquo
